name: vscode-auto-import
description: Fast workspace-wide auto import for TypeScript, Python, and Java

autoImport.excludeGlobs.description: Glob patterns to exclude from indexing

autoImport.minPrefixLength.description: Minimum prefix length before suggestions are offered

autoImport.preferBarrelImports.description: Prefer importing from barrel (index) files when available

autoImport.python.respectAllDunder.description: Respect __all__ list when determining exported Python symbols

autoImport.typescript.preferTypeImports.description: Whether to use 'import type' for type-only imports

autoImport.java.includeInnerClasses.description: Index public inner classes as separately importable symbols

autoImport.cache.maxDiskMB.description: Maximum cache size on disk in megabytes

autoImport.cache.location.description: Where to store the cache (workspace uses .vscode/.auto-import-cache)

scripts.smoke:parsers: node esbuild.js && esbuild --bundle --platform=node --format=cjs --log-level=warning --outfile=dist/smokeParsers.js src/test/smokeParsers.ts && node dist/smokeParsers.js
scripts.smoke:workspace: node esbuild.js && esbuild --bundle --platform=node --format=cjs --log-level=warning --outfile=dist/smokeWorkspace.js --external:vscode src/test/smokeWorkspace.ts && node dist/smokeWorkspace.js
scripts.smoke:completion: node esbuild.js && esbuild --bundle --platform=node --format=cjs --log-level=warning --outfile=dist/smokeCompletion.js --alias:vscode=./src/test/mockVscode.ts src/test/smokeCompletion.ts && node dist/smokeCompletion.js
scripts.smoke:all: npm run smoke && npm run smoke:parsers && npm run smoke:workspace && npm run smoke:completion
